About Organization

Indian Computer Emergency Response Team (ICERT) is a government organization that deals with computer security incidents. ICERT is responsible for coordinating and consolidating the efforts of the Indian government to prevent and mitigate cyber threats.

About the Programme

The ICERT Scientist B Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for candidates with a degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or Electronics and Communication Engineering. The programme aims to recruit 133 Scientist B posts in ICERT.
